assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates L4 pool upgrade (Step 1-3) and A100 pool upgrade (Phase 3) with distinct strategies for each pool type

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response uses blue-green approach creating new node pools rather than surge upgrade with maxSurge parameters for rolling replacement

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPU driver compatibility or testing with specific inference frameworks like TensorRT or vLLM

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions checking running jobs before upgrade and coordinating with fine-tuning jobs, including draining nodes for jobs near completion

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response does not mention that GPU VMs cannot be live migrated or that pods will restart causing latency spikes

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response mentions PDB in backup section but does not recommend creating or configuring PDBs specifically for the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response does not address the interaction between auto-scaler and node pool upgrades or mention version inconsistencies during upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response recommends creating a test cluster but does not specifically mention testing GPU driver and CUDA compatibility in staging environment
